title: apokrima #0610
definition:
1) an answer
   1a) \\#2Co 1:9\\ where the meaning is "on asking myself whether I should
       come out safe from mortal peril, I answered 'I must Die'"
nasbUsage:

   1a) \\#2Co 1:9\\ where the meaning is "on asking myself whether I should
       come out safe from mortal peril, I answered 'I must Die'"

    NASB:  a judicial sentence, by ext. an answer:
